name: Flamelord's Blessing
title: Goldflame Qucusaur Tyrant: Flamelord's Blessing
desc: "However, judging from his current title of 'Tyrant,' that story did not have a happy ending..."
in_play_description: When you trigger Goldflame State, also Discard 1 random card from your Hand. The DMG dealt by Goldflame State is increased by the Current Elemental Dice Cost of the card you Discarded from your Hand.

attributes.source: Reward for accepting the Tavern Challenge against the Goldflame Qucusaur Tyrant at The Cat's Tail and achieving all corresponding challenge objectives in a Friendly Fracas

skills.desc:
Combat Action: When your active character is Goldflame Qucusaur Tyrant, equip this card.
After Goldflame Qucusaur Tyrant equips this card, immediately use Goldflame Detonation once.
When you trigger Goldflame State, also Discard 1 random card from your Hand. The DMG dealt by Goldflame State is increased by the Current Elemental Dice Cost of the card you Discarded from your Hand.
(You must have Goldflame Qucusaur Tyrant in your deck to add this card to your deck.)
